name: Anise Pillows/Pfefferneuse
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder, lemon peel, salt, spices, and pepper; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat together margarine and sugar until creamy. Beat in egg.
3. Add the flour mixture alternately with milk, beating well after each addition. Stir in walnuts and anise seed.
4. Drop dough by teaspoonfuls (about 2 inches apart) onto lightly greased baking sheets.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15-17 minutes. Cool slightly on wire racks.
6. Roll the cookies in confectioner's sugar while they are still warm, then cool completely.
7. Makes 5 dozen cookies.
